## Resume Checklist

- [ ] Read this file before repository or PR mutation.
- [ ] Fetch `origin/main` and list every open PR.
- [ ] Confirm branch/worktree/PR/head ownership against live GitHub.
- [ ] Re-fetch checks, paginated review threads, review decision, and merge state.
- [ ] Treat a moved head or contradictory state as attention.
- [ ] Confirm the wake source cannot grant merge authority.
